name: Imitation Crab Salad
directions: Cut crab into bite-sized pieces.
Combine the crab with the onions, celery, lemon juice, mayonnaise, dill weed and horseradish; mix well.
Place the salad greens on 2 plates for large portions and 3 plates for small portions.
Divide crab mixture among the plates; sprinkle with the parsley.
Place lemon wedges on plate.
Serve.

similar.name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: Yummy Crab Salad
directions: Combine sour cream, green chilies, onion, cilantro, lime juice & salt together.
Add crab meat & toss together.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: California Crab Salad
directions: Flake crab with 1 t lemon juice in large bowl.
Add onion, celery (optional), vinegar, soy sauce, worcestershire, and 1 t dill.
Stir until mixed.
Stir in mayonnaise (adjust amount according to taste).
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Slice avocado into bitesize pieces and sprinkle with remaining 1 t lemon juice (keeps avocado from browning) and 1/2 t dill.
Gently stir avocados and olives into the salad.
Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
Serve or refrigerate for several hours.

similar.name: Caribbean Crabmeat Salad With Creamy Gingered Dressing

name: Shrimp and Crab Salad Rolls
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a large bowl, and stir well.
Add chopped cooked shrimp and lump crabmeat, stirring to combine.
Line each hoagie roll with 1 lettuce leaf.
Place 2/3 cup shrimp mixture in each bun.

name: Puffy Baked Crab
directions: Poach cod fillets in reserve crab liquid for about 10 minutes.
Drain.
In small mixing bowl, combine crab and cod; break into chunks or flake.
In larger mixing bowl, combine onion, celery, mayo, cream, half of almonds.
Blend well.
Fold in crab mixture and chopped eggs and beaten eggs.
Pour into prepared casserole dish and sprinkle with cracker crumbs, remaining almonds, parsley; and drizzle with melted butter.
Bake in 350 degrees F.; oven for about 30 minutes or until puffed and toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
Let set for 10 minutes before serving.
Can be baked in individual ramekins.

name: Caribbean Crabmeat Salad With Creamy Gingered Dressing
directions: Whisk together all dressing ingredients, and chill.
Combine crabmeat and next 4 ingredients in a large bowl.
Toss with mayonnaise dressing mixture.
Serve with greens on serving platter.
Garnish, if desired.

similar.name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)
directions: Arrange around the rim of a bowl some whole lettuce leaves.
Place in the center of the bowl about 1/2 cup shredded lettuce leaves.
Combine ingredients 1-9 in a bowl to make the Crab Louis sauce. Chill it if you have time for a few hours --  It will be better.
Add enough sauce to crab meat until crab is well coated but not runny and toss thoroughly. (you might not use all of the sauce).
Assemble into bowls and garnish with chopped eggs.
best if chilled but sometimes I can't wait.

similar.name: Caribbean Crabmeat Salad With Creamy Gingered Dressing

name: Open Faced Crab Sandwiches
directions: Preheat broiler.
In a bowl, combine crabmeat, green onions, cheese, mayonnaisse and cayenne (or hot pepper sauce).
Slice tomatoes into eight slices.
On a baking sheet or broiler pan place English muffin halves and broil 3-4 inches from heat until golden (3-5 minutes); remove from oven.
Place a tomato slice on each muffin half and top with crab mixture (about 1/2 cup per muffin half)and then sprinkle with extra shredded cheese, if desired.
Return to oven and broil until cheese browns. (3-5 minutes).

name: Crab Cakes Sandwiches
directions: In a bowl comine the first 7 ingredients.
Fold in the crabmeat; mix gently to combine then season with salt and pepper to taste.
Shape the mixture into 5 or 6 patties, then coat on both sides with dry breadcrumbs.
Place on a baking sheet or a flat plate; cover with plastic wrap and chill for a about 2 hours.
In a skillet heat oil and butter over medium-high heat.
Cook the crab patties on both sides until golden brown.
Serve between buns with tartar sauce and prepared coleslaw.
Delicious!

name: Crab Louis Salad
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a small bowl; whisk until well blended. Set aside.
Place shredded lettuce on a platter; arrange crabmeat, tomato slices, and egg slices on lettuce. Serve with dresing.

similar.name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: Spicy Crab Delights
directions: Mix crabmeat, mayo, Parmesan cheese and pepper sauce.
Fill pita bread pockets evenly with crab mixture.
Top each with dill sprig.
**Prepare as directed, substituting 16 thawed frozen miniature phyllo shells for the 8 halved miniature pita rounds.

similar.name: Caribbean Crabmeat Salad With Creamy Gingered Dressing
Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: King Crab Nachos
directions: To prepare ketchup: mix ketchup and Tabasco in a small bowl.
To prepare avocado cream: combine guacamole and 1 tablespoons sour cream in a separate bowl; cover and refrigerate until needed.
To prepare lime sour cream: blend sour cream and lime juice together in a small bowl.
Spread each chip with about 1 to 2 teaspoons avocado cream, 1 to 2 tsp chipotle ketchup and 3 to 4 pieces of king crab meat. Garnish with a dollop of lime sour cream and cilantro.

name: Crab Sandwiches
directions: Preheat your oven to 350°F.
Split english muffins, and place on a greased baking sheet.
Combine crab, mayo, and onion.  Mix until completely combined.  (You may add more or less mayo depending on how "wet" you like this mixture.).
Taste, and add salt and pepper as necessary.
Spread crab mixture evenly over the muffin halves.
In a small saucepan, over medium heat, melt the butter.
Add the flour, and whisk to combine.  Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in milk, and whisk to keep lumps from forming.
When milk is hot (DO NOT BOIL), add the cheese, continuing to stir constantly, until the cheese is fully melted, and the sauce thickens.
Taste, and add salt and pepper as necessary.
Top the muffins with the sauce.
Sprinkle with extra cheese to taste, and with paprika for color.
Bake at 350 F for 20 minutes, or until the sauce is golden and bubbly.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Don't Get Crabby With Me Salad (Crab Louis)

name: Crab Melts
directions: Pre-heat oven to 400 degrees.
Combine crab meat, mayo, green onion, garlic, shredded cheddar and pepper in a medium bowl.
On cookie sheet, lay croissants out open faced. Spread crab mixture over bottom half and lay cheese slices over top half. Bake in oven until browned. About 15 minutes.
I serve with a light green salad.

name: Crab Melts
directions: In medium bowl, combine crab, artichoke hearts, bell pepper, all but 3 tbsp green onion, mayonnaise, sour cream, and lemon zest; mix well.
Spread over bread slices; arrange cheese slices over crab mixture to cover.
Place sandwiches on baking sheet. Place under broiler until cheese softens, about 2 minutes.
Sprinkle with remaining 2 tbsp green onion.
